changes.what: Fixed robots/sitemap and submitted in GSC
Granted GA4 + Search Console read access
Author bios + credentials on key pages
Published llms.txt + entity catalog for AI crawlers

_axis.title: Claim and consolidate duplicate Google Business Profiles
_axis.intent: Duplicate/unclaimed listings split the ranking signal and let stale data win branded local queries.
_axis.goal: One verified, owner-managed GBP; every duplicate merged or marked permanently closed.

citation_nap_consistency.title: Fix NAP mismatches across the 7 core directories
citation_nap_consistency.intent: Inconsistent name/address/phone fragments local authority and breaks the entity match crawlers rely on.
citation_nap_consistency.goal: Byte-identical NAP on all 7 directories; confirm with a fresh citation audit.

urls.problem: tracking phone, not the main line

citation_nap_consistency.title: Add LocalBusiness + FinancialService schema to the locations page
citation_nap_consistency.intent: Without entity schema, engines can't confidently bind the site to the GBP/citation graph.
citation_nap_consistency.goal: Valid LocalBusiness/FinancialService JSON-LD, matching NAP, sameAs to the verified profiles.

gbp_completeness.title: Complete and verify the HQ Google Business Profile
gbp_completeness.intent: GBP completeness is the primary driver of map-pack visibility for high-intent funding queries.
gbp_completeness.goal: 100% profile (categories, services, hours, description, >=10 photos) with the verified badge.

gbp_completeness.title: Add secondary GBP categories (Equipment Financing, Working Capital)
gbp_completeness.intent: A single primary category caps eligibility for adjacent local intents the firm actually serves.
gbp_completeness.goal: Primary + 4 relevant secondary categories, each mapped to a service page.

review_depth_cadence.title: Stand up a post-funding review-request flow
review_depth_cadence.intent: Review volume and recency are top local factors and the biggest conversion lever on a trust-sensitive purchase.
review_depth_cadence.goal: >=1 net-new review/week (first-party + GBP); respond to every review within 48h.

urls.problem: static quotes, no live review feed

review_depth_cadence.title: Backfill responses to the 12 unanswered Google reviews
review_depth_cadence.intent: Unanswered reviews read as inattentive and quietly suppress conversion.
review_depth_cadence.goal: 100% of existing reviews answered; response template + escalation path documented.

_axis.title: Land 3 industry bylines / expert placements this quarter
_axis.intent: Third-party authority from reputable finance/industry sites is what moves EEAT and AI-citation eligibility — on-site content alone can't.
_axis.goal: 3 published placements with author bio + a contextual link back; tracked in the citation register.

_axis.title: Syndicate the funding-guide hub to 4 partner/aggregator sites
_axis.intent: Distribution multiplies the reach of assets we already have and earns referring domains without net-new writing.
_axis.goal: 4 partner republications with canonical + attribution; referral + citation lift measured at next scan.

_axis.title: Run a branded-search defense + high-intent campaign on Google Ads
_axis.intent: Competitors bid on the brand term and high-intent funding queries; paid captures demand now while organic compounds.
_axis.goal: Brand-defense campaign live + a high-intent non-brand adgroup; CAC and assisted conversions tracked.

_axis.title: Publish llms.txt + an entity-grounded FAQ/answer hub
_axis.intent: AI answer engines cite structured, entity-grounded answers; today the offering isn't reliably retrievable or citable.
_axis.goal: llms.txt shipped + 15 Q&A passages with schema; re-test prompt-citation baseline at next scan.

_axis.title: Pitch a data-backed funding-trends release for press pickup
_axis.intent: Earned coverage produces the third-party citations AI engines weight most and lifts authority simultaneously.
_axis.goal: 1 data release pitched to 10 outlets; >=2 pickups with links; logged to the causal register.
